CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), SaaS_Logging_Actv_Stage_Met_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK( SaaS_Logging_Actv_Stage_Met_Stamp__c )), SaaS_Logging_Actv_Stage_Met_Stamp__c, DATEVALUE( Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: SaaS Logging Activities Stage Met Date
